name: flactify-backend
description: Server used to stream FLAC files to a React Native mobile app.

scripts.db:deploy: npx prisma migrate deploy && npx prisma generate
scripts.db:push: npx prisma db push && npx prisma generate
scripts.db:migrate:name: npx prisma migrate dev --name
scripts.docker:db:generate: docker compose exec server npx prisma generate
scripts.docker:db:push: docker compose exec server npx prisma db push && docker compose exec server npx prisma generate
scripts.docker:db:migrate: docker compose exec server npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.docker:db:migrate:name: docker compose exec server npx prisma migrate dev --name
scripts.docker:db:deploy: docker compose exec server npx prisma migrate deploy && docker compose exec server npx prisma generate
scripts.docker:db:reset: docker compose exec server npx prisma migrate reset
scripts.docker:db:studio: docker compose exec server npx prisma studio --port 5555 --browser none
scripts.docker:db:status: docker compose exec server npx prisma migrate status
